body_txt: An entire family has been targeted for murder in a single attack or systematically. This massacre may be carried out by a disgruntled family member , someone with a grudge against the family, or a complete stranger, and for many kinds of reasons, such as Feuding Families , a way to psychologically hurt their target , a way of making their target pay for not doing what they want , a bout of serial killing , specifically wanting to end their lineage, etc. Alternatively, particularly in Eastern-influenced settings, it may be the legal penalty for treason. The devastation can be limited to a set of parents and their offspring (i.e., nuclear family) or target a much wider swath of lineage. If there are any survivors , they are likely to carry a grudge , or even vengeance , against the killer(s) (if they know who the killers are). Supertrope of Ruling Family Massacre , Pater Familicide . Compare Final Solution and The Purge for outright genocides. This can be the ultimate goal of a Familial Foe . No Real Life Examples, Please!
